# 📜 JACK COMMAND REFERENCE

*Auto-generated on 2026-04-26*

| Command | Plugin | Category | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/achievement` | admin | admin | Manually edit a player |
| `/adminguide` | admin | admin | Setup the permanent admin guide dashboard |
| `/announce` | admin | admin | Create a beautiful announcement in any channel |
| `/disable` | admin | admin | Disable a command category in a channel or server-wide |
| `/enable` | admin | admin | Enable a command category in a channel or server-wide |
| `/personality` | admin | admin | Interactive dashboard to configure Jack\ |
| `/setai` | admin | admin | Sets the smart AI channel for the server |
| `/setfoster` | admin | admin | Set the Foster Program channel |
| `/setlog` | admin | admin | Set the moderation log channel |
| `/regstatus` | audit | audit | Audit clan member registration status |
| `/card` | card-database | card-database | Card database management commands |
| `/hud` | celestial-hud | utility | Access your Celestial HUD (Live Status) |
| `/clanroster` | clan | clan | View the full clan player roster |
| `/dcroster` | clan | clan | View the full discord member player roster |
| `/deleteplayer` | clan | clan | Delete a player |
| `/editprofile` | clan | clan | Edit your BGMI player profile |
| `/ign` | clan | clan | View a player |
| `/ignall` | clan | clan | View a list of all player IGNs in the database (Admin Only) |
| `/profile` | clan | clan | Show BGMI player profile |
| `/profilecreate` | clan | clan | Create an unlinked BGMI player profile (Admin Only) |
| `/profiletransfer` | clan | clan | Link an unlinked profile to a Discord user (Admin Only) |
| `/register` | clan | clan | Register your BGMI player profile |
| `/uid` | clan | clan | View a player |
| `/unlinked` | clan | clan | View all unlinked player profiles (Admin Only) |

| `/editbp` | clan-battle | clan-battle | Edit a player |
| `/edittotalbp` | clan-battle | clan-battle | Edit a player |
| `/emoji` | emoji | emoji | Summon an emoji from the global CDN directly into chat. |
| `/emojiadd` | emoji | emoji | Summon a specific emoji from the Global Vault to your server. |
| `/emojibank` | emoji | emoji | View the Global Emoji Bank list. |
| `/emojibrowse` | emoji | emoji | Browse the visual interface of the Global Emoji Vault. |
| `/emojicleanup` | emoji | emoji | Scans for server emojis unused in the CDN for 30+ days. |
| `/emojiremove` | emoji | emoji | Remove an emoji from the global vault. |
| `/emojislots` | emoji | emoji | Check the current server emoji and sticker slot usage. |
| `/emojitemp` | emoji | emoji | Temporarily install a global emoji for 10 minutes to save slots. |
| `/fs-pairremove` | foster-program | foster-program | Remove a pair from the active Foster Program |
| `/fs-replace` | foster-program | foster-program | Replace a mentor or newbie in an active Foster Program pair |
| `/fs-start` | foster-program | foster-program | Start the Foster Program v2 (Staff Only) |
| `/action` | fun | fun | Perform a fun action (hug, slap, kiss, etc.) |
| `/tictactoe` | games | games | Challenge another user to a game of TicTacToe |
| `/tttlb` | games | games | View the TicTacToe leaderboard |
| `/setupgreeting` | greeting | admin | Configure channels for welcome and goodbye messages. |
| `/setup` | infrastructure | admin | Open the Neural Bridge dashboard to configure channels and roles. |
| `/leaderboard` | leveling | leveling | View the server XP leaderboard |
| `/rank` | leveling | leveling | Show your or another user |
| `/rankbackground` | leveling | leveling | Set your custom rank card background |
| `/cancelpop` | market | market | Cancel your active POP market listing |
| `/popmarket` | market | market | Force refresh the POP marketplace panel |
| `/sell` | market | market | List your POP for sale on the marketplace |
| `/addrole` | moderation | moderation | Add a role to a user |
| `/ban` | moderation | moderation | Ban a member from the server |
| `/clear` | moderation | moderation | Delete multiple messages from a channel |
| `/clearall` | moderation | moderation | Delete all messages in the channel (Nuke) |
| `/clearwarns` | moderation | moderation | Clear all warnings from a user |
| `/kick` | moderation | moderation | Kick a member from the server |
| `/lock` | moderation | moderation | Lock the current channel |
| `/mute` | moderation | moderation | Timeout a member for a specified duration |
| `/nickname` | moderation | moderation | Change a user |
| `/removerole` | moderation | moderation | Remove a role from a user |
| `/unban` | moderation | moderation | Unban a user from the server |
| `/unlock` | moderation | moderation | Unlock the current channel |
| `/unmute` | moderation | moderation | Remove timeout from a member |
| `/unwarn` | moderation | moderation | Remove a warning from a user |
| `/warn` | moderation | moderation | Warn a user with a reason |
| `/warnings` | moderation | moderation | View warnings for a user |

| `/packcreate` | packs | packs | Create an empty Emoji Pack in the Global Vault |

| `/rrremove` | roles | roles | Remove a Role option from a Reaction Role Panel |

| `/deleteteam` | teamup | teamup | Disband and delete your current team. |
